name: plugin-forge
description: High-quality Claude Code plugin builder. Guides you through a 7-phase workflow — from concept to validated, production-ready plugin — using parallel agents and proven design patterns.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Start a guided 7-phase plugin creation workflow

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review an existing plugin against production quality standards

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add a single component to an existing plugin

agents.name: needs-analyzer
agents.description: Analyzes plugin concept and determines optimal component architecture

agents.name: skill-architect
agents.description: Designs SKILL.md with progressive disclosure and strong trigger phrases

agents.name: component-builder
agents.description: Implements individual plugin components following best practices

agents.name: quality-reviewer
agents.description: Validates plugin quality against high-bar standards

skills.name: plugin-patterns
skills.description: This skill should be used when creating or reviewing any Claude Code plugin component — commands, agents, skills, hooks. Contains the distilled patterns from Anthropic's official plugin-dev and obra/superpowers.

skills.name: local-plugin-install
skills.description: This skill should be used when the user asks "플러그인 설치해줘", "install this plugin", "로컬 마켓플레이스에 등록해줘", "plugin install", or "이 플러그인 쓸 수 있게 해줘". Provides file structure requirements, format pitfalls, and CLI commands for local plugin installation.
